description: Mnemosyne retrieval eval set — Phase 4a baseline. 25 queries on real knowledge.
notes: expected_top: acceptable node names as returned by semantic_search (filename without ext). Comparison is normalized (lowercase + underscores).
expected_hit_k: minimum k at which we expect a hit. Queries with k=5 that still fail are documented baseline failures.
difficulty 'baseline_failure': node has placeholder body — currently failing, expected to improve after LLM enrichment or B4 chunking.
Category 'edge' requires --api and --key flags (tests KuzuDB graph via HTTP /search endpoint).
Category 'abstention' passes if top-1 cosine distance > abstention_threshold.
Collision note: giodalab / GiodaLab share the same normalized ID — the last sync wins. Detected by B2-opt2.

queries.query: luogo Val Tidone Borgonovo project location description
queries.notes: Main location node. 'Castel San Giovanni' avoided (separate node). 'BiG Project / Borgonovo' are in the embedded description.

queries.query: pannelli fotovoltaici energia rinnovabile impianto solare autonomia energetica
queries.notes: Body focuses on sustainability and renewable energy

queries.query: compleanno festa Rossella evento
queries.notes: Specific name query; node has deadline 2026-05-30

queries.query: Alejandra Alvarez sales coaching business development GiodaLab
queries.notes: Two nodes: Persone/alejandra.md and GiodaLab/professionisti/alejandra_alvarez.md — either is acceptable

queries.query: bandi nazionali regionali finanziamento controllo mensile primo lunedì
queries.notes: Long descriptive title maps well; monthly recurring task

queries.query: Mautic HubSpot integrazione CRM marketing workflow n8n Alejandra
queries.notes: Named integration node with specific tools listed

queries.query: presentazione alternativa PowerPoint ipertesto wiki slides
queries.notes: Distinct concept; body mentions PPT and wiki

queries.query: GiodaLab profilo aziendale competenze team
queries.notes: Collision: two nodes share normalized ID 'giodalab'. Last-sync wins. Both are acceptable.

queries.query: ricognizione settimanale intelligenza artificiale studenti aggiornamenti giovedì
queries.notes: Stub node created from alfred.md wikilink MANAGES relation; has observation body

queries.query: Alfred Mnemosyne sistema memoria online borgonovo.org
queries.notes: Body includes observation about Mnemosyne going back online; sparse but specific

queries.query: rogito atto notarile compravendita acquisto immobile
queries.notes: BASELINE FAILURE: body is placeholder 'An item related to the memory graph'. Fails at all k. Improves after LLM enrichment.

queries.query: serramenti infissi finestre porte restauro esterno
queries.notes: BASELINE FAILURE: placeholder body. Fails at all k.

queries.query: trasformare stalla spazio abitabile feste eventi
queries.notes: BASELINE FAILURE: placeholder body. The general B&B goal node also accepted as a semantic match.

queries.query: obiettivo scadenza Ganaghello 2026 completare entro
queries.notes: Only node with a 2026 deadline in Ganaghello project; semantic query should surface it

queries.query: task archiviato completato Ganaghello archivio 2024
queries.notes: BASELINE FAILURE: archived nodes have placeholder bodies; no semantic signal for 'archiviato'

queries.query: bandi finanziamento scadenza periodica controllo programmato
queries.notes: Same target as R05 but with temporal framing; validates temporal queries don't degrade recall

queries.query: impianto elettrico lavori in corso ristrutturazione in progress
queries.notes: BASELINE FAILURE: placeholder body; status=in_progress not semantically retrievable

queries.query: Alfred gestisce task ricorrenti studenti intelligenza artificiale
queries.notes: alfred.md declares MANAGES relation in wikilinks section

queries.query: ristrutturazioni progetto Ganaghello appartiene
queries.notes: ristrutturazioni.md declares PART_OF Ganaghello in frontmatter relations

queries.query: Wiki Slides progetto Giorgio presentazione
queries.notes: Wiki-style_Slides.md declares PART_OF Giorgio Borgonovo in frontmatter

queries.query: ricetta pasta carbonara guanciale uova pecorino romano
queries.notes: Food recipe, completely outside domain. BASELINE: dist=0.506 (< 0.55) — FAILS. Known false positive.

queries.query: prezzo Bitcoin Ethereum criptovalute exchange trading
queries.notes: Cryptocurrency, far from domain. BASELINE: dist=0.738 — passes.

queries.query: previsioni meteo pioggia temperatura domani
queries.notes: Weather forecast. BASELINE: dist=0.514 (> 0.49) — passes with small margin.

queries.query: orario treni Milano Roma Frecciarossa prenotazione biglietti
queries.notes: Train schedules. BASELINE: dist=0.401 — FAILS badly (returns 'task_ingegnere_contatti'). Known false positive.

queries.query: calcio Serie A classifica risultati partite domenica
queries.notes: Football. BASELINE: dist=0.415 — FAILS (returns 'dettagli_edificio'). Known false positive.
